root_cause: A concurrent agent process ran git stash twice mid-session (stash@{0}/@{1} on cfeaf41), silently reverting 14 uncommitted tracked files of approved work. Recovered via git checkout stash@{0} -- <paths> and an atomic restore+commit.
proposed_rule: COMMIT WINDOW DISCIPLINE: In the shared MAF repo, verified work on tracked files must be committed IMMEDIATELY after its suite passes - not at end of session. Any unexplained file reversion: check git stash list first; recover with git checkout stash@{N} -- <exact paths>; never drop or pop stashes that contain other agents WIP.
